assumptions: ABAP decimal type 'abap.dec(15,2)' translated to SQL DECIMAL(15,2)
ABAP 'ALL' keyword in MAX function removed as it's default behavior in SQL
conversion_notes: Translated CDS DEFINE VIEW to CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW
Converted ABAP aggregate functions to standard SQL aggregate functions
Preserved all column aliases and GROUP BY clause structure
Removed 'key' keyword as it has no equivalent in SQL view definition
